title: Opening for Store Manager at Burger King India South Asia Partners
company: Burger King India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Burger King India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Burger King India South Asia Partners in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Burger King India South Asia Partners:
Burger King India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India South Asia Partners!
